title: isodon rugosus
intro: Isodon rugosus, also known as the rough goldenroot or golden root, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family. It is a type of perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Isodon rugosus can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and reduce stress.
